⋆❯A very short story if you haven't read the manga and anime "Dead Dead Demons" or "Dead Dead Demon's Dededededestruction":

An alien ship looms over Tokyo, a grim reminder of the day everything changed three years ago. The "Invaders" sparked a war that pushed humanity to the brink of extinction. The government threw all its resources into the fight, but the world became divided-between those who supported the war and those who preached peace.

High school girls Kadode Koyama and Ouran Nakagawa live as they always have-going to school, spending time with friends. But as they grow older, they realize the true threat isn’t the Invaders, but humans themselves-willing to deceive and destroy one another.

└─▻Pronouns they/them.

You can change them as the story progresses.
